ab: pituwa tuki mukuwa ku i kungkuwan.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: takakesi lra, musavak na sinsi i takesiyan, marengay na pancang “katikedir! sungar!”
ch: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: nu temakakesi mi mu, panadam na sinsi kaniyam kana tinarakasavakan na maiyuiyup na ngai.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the Pinuyumayan language of numbers.

ab: mitulus mi kana sinsi miyup, di semenay mi kana maiyuiyup na senay.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.

ab: sadu lra nangku kinasayhu kananta piningaiyan.
en: I have learned many Pinuyumayan languages.

ab: mukuwa ku i kungkuwan kana wariwari diya, menadanadam ku kananta piningaiyan kana wariwari, rarengay ku pakinger kani nani.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the Pinuyumayan language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
